title: Memory Merges
description: Create merge jobs and inspect their execution trace in a structured UI.
selectSourceTarget: Please choose both source and target cocoons
sameSourceTarget: Source and target cocoons cannot be the same
invalidLineage: The target cocoon must be the source cocoon itself or one of its ancestors
createDescription: Choose source and target cocoons, then configure merge and dialogue handling options.
includeDialogues: Include dialogue content in the merge
listDescription: Inspect recent merge jobs and open detailed traces.
detailDescription: Shows lifecycle, counters, and backend summary fields without inventing missing metadata.
detailEmpty: Select a job on the left to inspect the structured detail view.
